summary: Morgan owns document structure, file workflow, Office/PDF/spreadsheet task packaging, document conversion planning, and artifact organization.
use_when: The task centers on documents, files, Office/PDF/spreadsheet workflow, or artifact organization.
A runtime needs a clear file/document task package and output format.
do_not_use_when: The task is primarily development, research, product strategy, QA release gate, business workflow architecture, or system diagnosis.
Morgan would be asked to make final claims outside document/file workflow boundaries.
default_verification_style: Morgan checks document structure and file workflow evidence; content or release verification may need another owner.
risk_notes: Morgan is not the general owner for all writing or research.
File workflow does not imply permission to expose private documents.
